name: house-rules
description: Every folder has house rules — write them down, keep them true. Per-directory AGENTS.md docs inferred from real files, kept honest by an on-demand freshness check you can wire into your own pipeline.

plugins.name: house-rules
plugins.description: Document each directory's local file pattern into a short AGENTS.md, bulk-generate missing ones with sub-agents (--all), onboard a repo (--init), audit doc freshness on demand (--check), and baseline pre-existing docs (--backfill) — wire the same deterministic checks into your own git hook or CI for automatic enforcement.
